que: Which startup mode is usually the slowest and should be optimized first?

options: The app is already visible in the foreground
The app process is not in memory and must start from scratch
The app has no internet connection

que: Which Android library is recommended for measuring startup timing in benchmarks?
Which build type should you use for realistic performance testing?
What does the Jetpack App Startup library help with?

options: It shows what work happens during launch so bottlenecks can be identified
It removes the need for measurement

que: Which of the following is a recommended startup optimization?
options: Do all network and disk work before the first frame
Defer noncritical work until after the app is usable
Load every large image at startup
That the app is fully drawn and ready for timing/reporting purposes
That the app entered Doze mode

que: Which performance tool is explicitly recommended for startup timing traces and benchmarking?
What is a common mistake when working on startup performance?
options: Optimizing without measurement or focusing only on debug builds
